input: I'm wrapping up the onboarding for Nexus Tech and need to verify sarah.mitchell@nexustech.io and check connectivity on +14155552671 before we move forward. If both are valid, please pull their payment initiation summary from 2023-10-01 through 2023-12-31, limiting the results to 50 records.
output: The query successfully returned 3 payment initiation records for Nexus Tech between October and December 2023. This confirms the account has valid transaction history required for the verification process. I will present the transaction summary for your review.
